mapper.select:
select distinct c.id, c.competition_name, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, status as role, c.update_time, CASE WHEN NOW() < c.registration_begin THEN 0 WHEN NOW() >= c.registration_begin AND NOW() <= c.registration_end THEN 1 WHEN NOW() > c.registration_end AND NOW() <= c.activity_end THEN 2 ELSE 3 END as competition_status from competition c, competition_team ct, team t, team_user tu
c.id = ct.competition_id and ct.team_id = t.id and t.id = tu.team_id and tu.user_id = #{userId}
and c.competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
order by competition_status, c.update_time desc

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.competition_name, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, status as role, c.update_time FROM competition c JOIN competition_team ct ON c.id = ct.competition_id JOIN team t ON ct.team_id = t.id JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id
tu.user_id = #{userId}
AND c.competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
AND NOW() < c.registration_begin
ORDER BY c.update_time DESC

SELECT distinct c.id, c.competition_name, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, status as role, c.update_time FROM competition c JOIN competition_team ct ON c.id = ct.competition_id JOIN team t ON ct.team_id = t.id JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id
tu.user_id = #{userId}
AND c.competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
and now() >= c.registration_begin and now() <= c.registration_end
order by c.update_time desc

SELECT distinct c.id, c.competition_name, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, status as role, c.update_time FROM competition c JOIN competition_team ct ON c.id = ct.competition_id JOIN team t ON ct.team_id = t.id JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id
c.id = ct.competition_id and ct.team_id = t.id and t.id = tu.team_id and tu.user_id = #{userId}
and c.competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
and now() > c.registration_end and now() <= c.activity_end
order by c.update_time desc

SELECT distinct c.id, c.competition_name, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, status as role, c.update_time FROM competition c JOIN competition_team ct ON c.id = ct.competition_id JOIN team t ON ct.team_id = t.id JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id
c.id = ct.competition_id and ct.team_id = t.id and t.id = tu.team_id and tu.user_id = #{userId}
and c.competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
and now() > c.activity_end
order by c.update_time desc

SELECT c.id, c.competition_name, c.introduction, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, cc.id AS categoryId, cc.name AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tu.user_id) FROM competition_team ct JOIN team t ON ct.team_id = t.id JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id WHERE ct.competition_id = c.id) AS competition_people FROM competition c LEFT JOIN competition_category cc ON c.category_id = cc.id
now() < c.registration_begin
AND c.competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
AND c.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY c.update_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT u.avatar_url AS avatar FROM competition_team ct JOIN team t ON ct.team_id = t.id JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id JOIN user u ON tu.user_id = u.id WHERE ct.competition_id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.competition_name, c.introduction, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, cc.id AS categoryId, cc.name AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tu.user_id) FROM competition_team ct JOIN team t ON ct.team_id = t.id JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id WHERE ct.competition_id = c.id) AS competition_people FROM competition c LEFT JOIN competition_category cc ON c.category_id = cc.id
c.competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
AND c.category_id = #{categoryId}
and now() >= c.registration_begin and now() <= c.registration_end
ORDER BY c.update_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.competition_name, c.introduction, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, cc.id AS categoryId, cc.name AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tu.user_id) FROM competition_team ct JOIN team t ON ct.team_id = t.id JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id WHERE ct.competition_id = c.id) AS competition_people FROM competition c LEFT JOIN competition_category cc ON c.category_id = cc.id
c.competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
AND c.category_id = #{categoryId}
and now() >= c.registration_end and now() <= c.activity_end
ORDER BY c.update_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.competition_name, c.introduction, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, cc.id AS categoryId, cc.name AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tu.user_id) FROM competition_team ct JOIN team t ON ct.team_id = t.id JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id WHERE ct.competition_id = c.id) AS competition_people FROM competition c LEFT JOIN competition_category cc ON c.category_id = cc.id
c.competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
AND c.category_id = #{categoryId}
and now() > c.activity_end
ORDER BY c.update_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.competition_name, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, c.update_time FROM competition c
AND c.competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
AND now() < c.registration_begin
ORDER BY c.update_time DESC

SELECT distinct c.id, c.competition_name, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, c.update_time FROM competition c
AND c.competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
and now() >= c.registration_begin and now() <= c.registration_end
order by c.update_time desc

select distinct c.id, c.competition_name, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, c.update_time from competition c
and c.competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
and now() > c.registration_end and now() <= c.activity_end
order by c.update_time desc

select distinct c.id, c.competition_name, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, c.update_time from competition c
and c.competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
and now() > c.activity_end
order by c.update_time desc

SELECT c.id, c.competition_name, c.introduction, c.registration_begin, c.registration_end, c.activity_end, c.people, c.notes, c.schedule, u.avatar_url AS judgeAvatarUrl, u.username AS judgeName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM competition_team ct WHERE ct.competition_id = c.id) AS teamCount FROM competition c LEFT JOIN judge j ON c.id = j.competition_id LEFT JOIN user u ON j.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
select id from competition where awards_status = #{unawards} and now() > activity_end
select id, competition_name from competition where awards_status = #{awards} and now() > activity_end limit 5
select distinct tu.user_id from team_user tu left join team t on tu.team_id = t.id left join competition_team ct on t.id = ct.team_id where ct.competition_id = #{competitionId}
